brief_summary: Buy-window timeline with electric-pink markers at 2026-04-28 (opens) and 2026-05-31 (closes), with a filled bar spanning the five-week window labelled 'both palettes available · single checkout'. Three chips below: designer (MiKeyDigit), profile · material (CYL · doubleshot ABS), and region (global · KBDfans).
